(define (make-procedure params body env)
  (list 'procedure params body env))

(define (procedure? obj)
  (and (pair? obj) (eq? (car obj) 'procedure)))

(define (procedure-params proc) (car (cdr proc)))
(define (procedure-body proc) (car (cdr (cdr proc))))
(define (procedure-env proc) (car (cdr (cdr (cdr proc)))))

;; Main evaluation function
(define (my-eval expr env)
  (cond
    ;; Self-evaluating expressions
    ((number? expr) expr)
    ((string? expr) expr)
    ((eq? expr #t) #t)
    ((eq? expr #f) #f)
    
    ;; Variables
    ((symbol? expr) (env-lookup env expr))
    
    ;; Special forms
    ((pair? expr)
     (let ((op (car expr)))
       (cond
         ;; Quote
         ((eq? op 'quote) (car (cdr expr)))
         
         ;; If
         ((eq? op 'if)
          (if (my-eval (car (cdr expr)) env)
              (my-eval (car (cdr (cdr expr))) env)
              (if (pair? (cdr (cdr (cdr expr))))

                      (params (cdr name-or-list))
                      (body (cdr (cdr expr))))
                  (let ((proc (make-procedure params body env)))

                    name)))))

;; Environment representation as association lists
(define (make-env parent)
  (cons '() parent))

(define (env-define env name value)
  (set-car! env (cons (cons name value) (car env))))

(define (env-lookup env name)
  (define (lookup-in-frame frame)
    (cond ((null? frame) #f)
          ((eq? (car (car frame)) name) (car frame))
          (else (lookup-in-frame (cdr frame)))))

  (lookup-in-env env))

;; Main evaluation function
(define (my-eval expr env)
  (cond
    ;; Self-evaluating expressions
    ((number? expr) expr)
    ((string? expr) expr)
    ((eq? expr #t) #t)
    ((eq? expr #f) #f)
    
    ;; Variables
    ((symbol? expr) (env-lookup env expr))
    
    ;; Special forms
    ((pair? expr)
     (let ((op (car expr)))
       (cond
         ;; Quote
         ((eq? op 'quote) (car (cdr expr)))
         
         ;; If
         ((eq? op 'if)
          (if (my-eval (car (cdr expr)) env)
              (my-eval (car (cdr (cdr expr))) env)
              (if (pair? (cdr (cdr (cdr expr))))
                  (my-eval (car (cdr (cdr (cdr expr)))) env)
                  #f)))
         
         ;; Define
         ((eq? op 'define)
          (let ((name-or-list (car (cdr expr))))
            (if (symbol? name-or-list)
                ;; Simple define
                (let ((value (my-eval (car (cdr (cdr expr))) env)))
                  (env-define env name-or-list value)
                  name-or-list)
                ;; Function define shorthand
                (let ((name (car name-or-list))
                      (params (cdr name-or-list))
                      (body (cdr (cdr expr))))
                  (let ((proc (make-procedure params body env)))
                    (env-define env name proc)
                    name)))))
         
         ;; Lambda
         ((eq? op 'lambda)
          (let ((params (car (cdr expr)))
                (body (cdr (cdr expr))))
            (make-procedure params body env)))
         
         ;; Let
         ((eq? op 'let)
          (let ((bindings (car (cdr expr)))
                (body (cdr (cdr expr))))
            (let ((new-env (make-env env)))
              (define (process-bindings bs)
                (if (pair? bs)
                    (let ((binding (car bs)))
                      (let ((name (car binding))
                            (value (my-eval (car (cdr binding)) env)))
                        (env-define new-env name value)
                        (process-bindings (cdr bs))))))
              (process-bindings bindings)
              (eval-sequence body new-env))))
         
         ;; Cond
         ((eq? op 'cond)
          (eval-cond (cdr expr) env))
         
         ;; Begin/progn
         ((or (eq? op 'begin) (eq? op 'progn))
          (eval-sequence (cdr expr) env))
         
         ;; Function application
         (else
          (let ((proc (my-eval op env))
                (args (eval-list (cdr expr) env)))
            (apply-procedure proc args))))))
    
    ;; Not a valid expression
    (else expr)))
EOF",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
